name: hud_ui_zrd_widget_constructor
description: HudUiZrdWidget::Constructor initializes the base widget, four panel pointer vectors, image/sound state, ftable, visibility flags, and invalidation state.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 382 unmasked mismatches after relocation masking; Binary Ninja body is 434 bytes and the VC object body is 352 bytes with 11 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

Reviewed drift remains dominated by original MSVC STL vector EH state scaffolding and dead empty-vector copy loops around the HudUiPanelPtrVector members; the current source models allocator proxy initialization, vector clear calls, low-word image state, and ftable invalidation, but VC still optimizes away the dead loops and omits the original EH registration.

The native smoke covers base constructor effects, ftable identity, mode/flag/image state, invalidation state, zeroed vector begin/end/capacity members, preserved bounds and disabled-sound fields, return-independent object initialization, and initialized rollover/activate scale values.
